# GitHub Pages Workflows

This folder intentionally starts with documentation only.

Because GitHub Pages is usually one custom domain per Pages site, create deployment workflows after choosing one of these options:

1. Split `sites/islandtech` and `sites/mobilemeridian` into separate GitHub Pages repositories.
2. Keep this as the source repository and use GitHub Actions to publish each static folder to a separate target repository.
3. Use another host later that supports multiple custom domains and host routing from one project.
